mapper.sql: id, code, name, discipline, project_class, proj_type, source_unit_name, start_date, end_date, state, note, create_time, creator_code, is_review_needed, file_ids
mapper.select:
select spai.id as rowId,spai.name,spai.state as state, spai.start_date as startDate,cspat.name as projTypeName,spai.end_date as endDate,spai.note as note,spai.source_unit_name as sourceUnitName
from srm_project_apply_info spai left join ct_srm_proj_type cspat on cspat.code=spai.proj_type where 1=1
and spai.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{projectApplyInfoDto.name}, '%')
and spai.state=#{projectApplyInfoDto.state}
order by spai.id desc

select spai.id as rowId,spai.name,spai.state as state, spai.start_date as startDate, spai.end_date as endDate,spai.note as note, spai.source_unit_name as sourceUnitName,cspat.code as "projType.id",cspat.name as "projType.name" from srm_project_apply_info spai left join ct_srm_proj_type cspat on cspat.code=spai.proj_type where spai.id=#{rowId}
